summary: Single Team subscriber Peacock archive subscribed team - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a user is a Single Team subscriber
AND an archive Peacock game contains the subscribed team

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archive Peacock game tile
steps.result:
THEN the user will see the Peacock feed button
AND a message does not display letting the user know where the game can be watched
AND the user can playback the Peacock feed
